Ergonomics & Usability

Usablility for All

This repository is the playground of @Andreas_Helge (Centre of Competence for Ergonomics & Usability) to understand how universal design for the web works and share the knowledge with the developers to make our websites and (mostly) web applications more usable and accessible for all of our clients and employees. And to fulfil the requirements for software development of Allianz Group.

Content

All experiments and examples are clustered after our requirements document:

  1. Fonts
    • Colours
    • Scalability
    • and so on

font

Infos about the super awesome requirement for fonts.

I'm the awesome footer.
